sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_randBernoulli (id UInt64, result UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_randBernoulli (id, result) SELECT number, randBernoulli(0.5) FROM numbers(10);
UPDATE test_randBernoulli SET result = randBernoulli(0.3) WHERE id % 2 = 0;
SELECT id, result FROM test_randBernoulli WHERE result = 1;
SELECT count(*) FROM test_randBernoulli WHERE result = randBernoulli(0.2);
